# iosxe_eigrp (Data Source)

This data source can read the EIGRP configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "iosxe_eigrp" "example" {
  name = "TOPGEN"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) EIGRP virtual-instance name

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `auto_summary` (Boolean) Enable automatic network number summarization
- `autonomous_system` (Number) Autonomous system number
- `id` (String) The path of the retrieved object.
- `networks` (Attributes List) Enable routing on an IP network (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--networks))
- `router_id` (String) Router ID for this EIGRP process
- `shutdown` (Boolean) Shutdown address family
- `topology_base` (String) Base topology (always base)

<a id="nestedatt--networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `networks`

Read-Only:

- `ip` (String) Network number
- `wildcard` (String) EIGRP wild card bits
